description: Tool version and checksum manifest for staleness detection

tools.name: actionlint
tools.notes: Used in devcontainer for GitHub Actions workflow linting

tools.name: gitleaks
tools.notes: Used in devcontainer for secret scanning. Vendor names linux amd64 asset 'linux_x64'.

psModules.name: PowerShell-Yaml
psModules.notes: YAML parser used by lint:yaml and collection metadata validation; pinned to known-good stable per ADR in docs/security/dependency-pinning.md

psModules.name: Pester
psModules.notes: PowerShell test framework; required by all *.Tests.ps1 files via #Requires -Modules @{ ModuleName='Pester'; RequiredVersion='5.7.1' }

psModules.name: PSScriptAnalyzer
psModules.notes: PowerShell linter used by lint:ps; pinned for reproducible analysis results across CI and devcontainer
